global.waveforms_buffer_max_size_note1: This value is in number of waveforms in the buffer
global.waveforms_buffer_max_size_note2: It is not a strict threshold, if more are available in the readout they are not discarded.
global.waveforms_buffer_max_size_note3: If too big, the following analysis steps might slow down
global.waveforms_buffer_max_size_note4: If too small, then the overhead might be too much
global.waveforms_buffer_max_size_note5: Waveform minimum dimension: 14 B (header) + 2 B * samples_number

cards.records_number_note: This should be comparable to the expected rate
cards.timestamp_bit_shift_note1: the timestamp may be shifted in order to align it with the waan analysis module
cards.timestamp_bit_shift_note2: the ADQ214 timestamp has a step of 1 / (800 MHz)
cards.timestamp_bit_shift_note3: there are two additional bits that increase its time resolution, only when using an external trigger
cards.timestamp_bit_shift_note4: so in total there are then 3 bits of fractional part given by the digitizer
cards.timestamp_bit_shift_note5: to have 8 bits of fractional part use: 5 bit
cards.timestamp_bit_shift_note6: the conversion factor is (PLL divider) / (800 MHz) / 2^(total number of fractional bits)
cards.PLL_divider_note1: The internal reference clock runs at 800 MHz, but the minimum value for the PLL divider is 2, maximum is 20
cards.PLL_divider_note2: WARNING: Some values to not appear to work

channels.name: Detector
channels.triggering_note: Enables the self triggering on this channel
channels.coupling_note1: WARNING: The DC coupling has a significant higher noise level
channels.coupling_note2: WARNING: The DC coupling has different offsets for the two channels, while the trigger level is common, so the effective minimum threshold for the two channels is different

trigger.level_note: in absolute ADC channels, not relative to the baseline

trigger_output.source_note1: 'channels' uses the level triggering on the channels
trigger_output.source_note2: 'event' uses whatever trigger event of the board, check datasheet
trigger_output.width_note1: length of the output pulse in ns
